parts.text: what wholud you do

As a Python enthusiast, I would suggest exploring various online resources to expand your Python skills further. Some popular options include Codecademy, W3Schools, Real Python, and Python.org. Each of these platforms offers tutorials, interactive coding lessons, and articles that cater to different learning styles and preferences. Happy learning!
what other things you do

As a Python enthusiast, I recommend visiting various online communities and forums dedicated to the Python programming language to stay up-to-date on new developments and engage with fellow programmers. Here are some popular resources that may interest you:
1. r/Python - A subreddit with discussions, tutorials, and projects related to Python.
2. Python Weekly - An email newsletter featuring weekly updates on Python news, events, and jobs.
3. PyCoder's Weekly - Another email newsletter with Python-related articles, tutorials, and resources.
4. The Python Standard Library - A comprehensive collection of built-in modules for common programming tasks.
which programming language you know
